title: Immigration policy and law :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Immigration policy and law
Immigration laws and policies set the rules for people who want to visit, work, study, live, start a business, or invest in New Zealand.
- Immigration law New Zealand immigration laws provide a framework for us to manage immigration in a way that balances our national interests with our international obligations, protecting both New Zealanders and migrants.
New Zealand immigration laws provide a framework for us to manage immigration in a way that balances our national interests with our international obligations, protecting both New Zealanders and migrants.
- Immigration instructions and changes Learn about the immigration policies and processes we use to make decisions about visa applications.

## Immigration instructions and changes
Learn about the immigration policies and processes we use to make decisions about visa applications.
- Internal Administration Circulars Internal Administration Circulars (IAC) give immigration staff information about our procedures and processes. We publish these circulars when they are developed. They generally provide clarity about the instructions contained within the New Zealand Operational Manual, but are not part of the Manual.

## Internal Administration Circulars
Internal Administration Circulars (IAC) give immigration staff information about our procedures and processes. We publish these circulars when they are developed. They generally provide clarity about the instructions contained within the New Zealand Operational Manual, but are not part of the Manual.
- Advice to immigration staff Advice to immigration staff helps them to interpret and apply immigration instructions in a fair and consistent way. We update this advice as immigration instructions and conditions change, and to reflect best practice.

## Advice to immigration staff
Advice to immigration staff helps them to interpret and apply immigration instructions in a fair and consistent way. We update this advice as immigration instructions and conditions change, and to reflect best practice.
- Special directions Special directions are issued by the Minister of Immigration in the New Zealand Government on matters related to immigration.
Special directions are issued by the Minister of Immigration in the New Zealand Government on matters related to immigration.
